task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Enforce single font and single font size across the entire file.

1. Find every inline style with fontSize and set to 14px
2. Find every inline style with fontFamily and set to 'Inter, sans-serif'
3. Find every fontWeight that is not 500 or 400 and normalize — labels use 500, body uses 400
4. Remove any fontStyle: 'italic' or font-style italic

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
All font sizes 14px
All font families Inter
No italic text
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: break any logic
DO NOT: use ast.parse
